job.title: Senior Java / Spring Developer
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: Join our team in Aix-en-Provence as a Senior Java / Spring Developer. You are the technical lead of the project and support developers in upskilling.
mission.1: Design and develop Java Spring Boot applications
profile.1: Bachelor's to Master's degree in software development
profile.2: 5 to 9 years of experience Java / Spring
profile.3: Expert Spring Boot, Microservices, JPA, Kafka
profile.4: Good knowledge of Docker and Kubernetes
